Class AllReportsController.SalesReportRow

java.lang.Object
com.boba.AllReportsController.SalesReportRow
Enclosing class:
AllReportsController
public class AllReportsController.SalesReportRow extends Object
This is a nested class within the AllReportsController It contains the values of each row in a table of the Sales Report
Author:
Grant Duong, Nilay Alwar, Eli Goodrich, Maher Zaveri, Jack Anderson

  • Constructor Details

    • SalesReportRow

      public SalesReportRow(int itemId, String itemName, int total, Double totalRevenue)
      The constructor for each row in the Sales Report table
      Parameters:
      itemId - The ID for each item
      itemName - The name for each item
      total - The total number of the item that have been sold
      totalRevenue - The total revenue made from selling this item

    • getTotal

      public int getTotal()
      Returns:
      Returns the total amount of the item that have been sold

      public javafx.beans.property.SimpleIntegerProperty totalProperty()
      Returns:
      Returns the total amount of the item being sold
